gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/512)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/512)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا إِبْرَاهِيمَ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ مَنِ اسْتَكْفَى بِآيَةٍ مِنَ الْقُرْآنِ مِنَ الشَّرْقِ إِلَى الْغَرْبِ كُفِيَ إِذَا كَانَ بِيَقِينٍ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Al Husayn Bin Ahmad Al Minqary who said,

‘I heard Abu Ibrahim<sup>asws</sup> (7<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>) saying: ‘The one who suffices with one Verse from the Quran from the east to the west, that would suffice him, when that was with conviction’.
en.sarwar: 18. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from al- Husayn ibn Ahmad al-Minqari who has said the following: “I heard abu Ibrahim (a.s.) saying, ‘If one considers one verse of the Holy Quran sufficient (for his protection) from East to West, it is enough [with certainty].”’
